title: Matthew Sloan
content:

'''Matthew Sloan''', along with his friend Aaron Yonda, is the creator of the [[Wikipedia:Chad Vader: Day Shift Manager|''Chad Vader: Day Shift Manager'']] web series, where he also provided the voice of the title character. After the success of the series, Sloan was hired to voice [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]] in multiple official products.

He also played Vader in the 2011 fan film ''Hughes the Force'', and reprised his Chad Vader voice in character for the RiffTrax commentary of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. Additionally, Sloan appeared as Vader in a ''Star Wars''–themed episode of ''Deal or No Deal''.
